songStyle: confessional, suicidal ideation, grief, raw, vulnerable
notes: Cataloged from lyrics provided in meeting. Structure: Chorus → Verse 1 → Verse 2 → Bridge → Verse 3 → Outro. Extremely dark content — explicit suicidal ideation ('Only way out may be suicide'), addiction, narcissism, childhood trauma. Bridge pivot offers hope ('I will guide you through the rough storms'). Outro ends with funeral imagery — 'We gather here today for Luke Gawne... close the casket then it's blackness.' Names dropped: mom and dad, Rebecca, Gabby, Nick, Paul.
